summary: Comprehensive testing of Hour Bank & Reporting Module Upgrade. All backend APIs working correctly (11/11 tests passed). Frontend features fully functional: Bridge Payments settings tab, multi-tier Hour Bank display, manual entry form, Predictive Eligibility dashboard, Claims Source column.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/settings/bridge-payment returns enabled and rate_per_hour
✅ Backend: PUT /api/settings/bridge-payment updates and persists config
✅ Backend: GET /api/hour-bank/{member_id} returns multi-tier data (current_balance, reserve_balance, burn_rate, months_remaining, at_risk, eligibility_source, bridge info)
✅ Backend: GET /api/hour-bank/NONEXISTENT returns 404
✅ Backend: POST /api/hour-bank/{member_id}/manual-entry adds hours to ledger
✅ Backend: POST /api/hour-bank/{member_id}/bridge-payment requires bridge enabled (returns 400 when disabled)
✅ Backend: POST /api/hour-bank/run-monthly processes multi-tier buckets with reserve_draws count
✅ Backend: GET /api/reports/predictive-eligibility returns summary (total, at_risk, critical, healthy) and members list
✅ Backend: GET /api/reports/hour-bank-deficiency returns multi-tier columns (current_balance, reserve_balance, total_balance, burn_rate, months_remaining, at_risk)
✅ Backend: GET /api/claims returns claims with eligibility_source field
✅ Backend: POST /api/claims creates claims with eligibility_source stamped
✅ Frontend: Settings > Bridge Payments tab renders with toggle, rate input, save button
✅ Frontend: Bridge Payments toggle enables/disables rate input correctly
✅ Frontend: Bridge Payments save persists configuration
✅ Frontend: Reports > Hour Bank Deficiency section shows multi-tier view description
✅ Frontend: Reports > Predictive Eligibility dashboard shows 4 summary cards (Total Members, Healthy, At Risk, Critical)
✅ Frontend: Claims page has Source column header
✅ Frontend: Members > Hour Bank tab shows Current/Reserve balances
✅ Frontend: Members > Hour Bank tab shows Burn Rate and Months Left
✅ Frontend: Members > Hour Bank tab shows Eligibility Source badge (Standard Hours)
✅ Frontend: Members > Hour Bank tab has Manual Entry form with Hours input, Description, Add button
✅ Frontend: Members > Hour Bank tab shows Ledger with entries (C: and R: columns for current/reserve after)
✅ Frontend: Claim Detail page shows Examiner Workspace with Standard badge

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Hour Bank Module Upgrade features working)

seed_data_creation: Manual entry test added +10 hrs to MBR001 with description 'TEST_MANUAL_ENTRY'. Bridge payment settings toggled and rate set to $35/hr during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hour Bank Module Upgrade fully tested. Key features verified: 1) Bridge Payment settings GET/PUT at /api/settings/bridge-payment, 2) Multi-tier hour bank ledger with current_balance, reserve_balance, burn_rate, months_remaining, at_risk, eligibility_source, 3) Manual hour entry at POST /api/hour-bank/{member_id}/manual-entry, 4) Bridge payment execution at POST /api/hour-bank/{member_id}/bridge-payment (requires bridge enabled), 5) Monthly run with reserve_draws tracking, 6) Predictive Eligibility dashboard at GET /api/reports/predictive-eligibility, 7) Enhanced hour-bank-deficiency report with multi-tier columns, 8) Claims integration with eligibility_source field. Test member MBR001 has hour bank entries. No plans currently have eligibility_threshold > 0, so predictive eligibility shows 0 members.
